description:
Operating Area: Alaska

Join "Northern Explorer Adventures", one of the world's most unique yacht charter companies, with the most unique itineraries and experienced crew, we then combine that with a world-class, five-star culinary menu that is unmatched.  Get away from the crowds and closer to the real Alaska than you ever thought possible. All from the unequaled comfort of our beautiful 68-foot adventure yacht. Behold the allure of "The Great Land." It’s the Alaska few have the opportunity to experience. And it’s yours when you book your Alaska private yacht cruise with "Northern Explorer Adventures".​

pricing.note:
***ASK ABOUT OUR EARLY-BIRD SPECIAL***
Our all-inclusive small ship Alaska cruise rates vary depending on the length of your trip, stateroom choice and number of people. Costs are calculated per person, and all rates are based on double occupancy. See our cruise calendar for the 2023 schedule and availability.

TRAVELING SOLO?
Our rates are based on double occupancy, however, we are happy to accommodate single travelers. If you want to guarantee a private stateroom, a 65 percent single supplement charge will apply. If you are willing to share a stateroom, but we are unable to match you with a roommate, you will not be charged the single supplement. Please let us know your preference when making your reservation.
​
ALL-INCLUSIVE
Our small ship Alaska cruise rates include the following:
• Luxury stateroom accommodations
• All gourmet meals, including breakfast, lunch, appetizers, dinner and dessert throughout your trip
• All beverages including Alaska microbrews and fine wines (some restrictions) for our guests over the age of 21
• Use of outdoor gear and equipment, including kayaks
• Guided shore excursions with our experienced, attentive crew
​
​Please note that prices do not include:
• Airfare
• Gratuities (please make arrangements for gratuity payments prior to boarding) 
• Taxes
• Transportation to and from the vessel (please inquire for our shuttle service)
• Travel insurance
• Fishing licenses
• Specialty alcoholic beverages
​
PAYMENT OPTIONS
We accept:
• Visa, MasterCard and American Express (please add 2% if using AmEx)
• Personal check (check must clear bank before booking is confirmed)
• Direct deposit
